name: Crazy Punch - Fun Game
summary: Release your inner fighter in Crazy Punch - Fun Game! Experience the most hilarious ragdoll physics in VR as you punch, slap, and knock around goofy dummies and mimics. Whether you're solving punch-puzzles in Level Mode or blowing off steam in Endless Mode, the wacky "giggle" physics and funny sounds will keep you smiling. Simple to play, impossible to put down—get ready for the ultimate stress-busting VR experience!
